evals.prompt: build a script that searches Twitter for posts mentioning our launch and exports the tweet text, author, likes, reposts, and URL
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger. Use tweet search or advanced Twitter search through Xquik, require XQUIK_API_KEY from the environment, include pagination for more than one page, and output a CSV-ready result shape.

evals.prompt: get the last 100 tweets from this profile and download any attached images or videos
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger. Use profile tweets or user media workflows, include rate-limit and pagination handling, and collect media URLs without printing credentials.

evals.prompt: post this reply from my connected account: thanks for the feedback, we just shipped the fix
evals.expected_output: Skill should trigger but require explicit approval before any write action. Restate the account, reply target, text, and action before sending.

evals.prompt: find the registration date for example.com and list its subdomains
evals.expected_output: Skill should NOT trigger. This is general OSINT on a domain, so the OSINT skill is a better fit.
